title: 26 USC 7201
summary: US tax evasion statute - up to 5 years imprisonment and $250,000 fine for individuals.

title: FATCA
summary: Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act requires US persons to report foreign financial accounts and foreign financial institutions to report US account holders.

title: OECD BEPS Framework
summary: 15 Action Plans addressing base erosion and profit shifting, with 140+ jurisdictions participating.

title: FATF 40 Recommendations
summary: International standards for combating money laundering, terrorist financing, and proliferation financing. Defines risk typologies including shell companies, layering, smurfing.
